The '''ABX-110 Tube-Launched ABC Scrambler''' was an [[Aural-Biological-Chemical Scrambler|ABC scrambler]] modified from an [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[anti-ordnance EM probe]]. It was employed by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] to disorient targets<ref name="GG10" /> and by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces in order to suppress large unruly crowds.<ref name="GFT">''[[Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear]]''</ref>

==Description==
Each ABC pod normally took one [[Standard minute/Legends|minute]] to charge up before it could be fired, although it could be rushed into firing in less time. Once launched, the pod would emit full-spectrum ultrasonics, biological irritants and chemical agents over an area up to thirty [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in diameter. Those caught within this area would be incapacitated for several minutes by the massive sensory overload.<ref name="GG10" />
